    Manager - Class in Entities
    Represents a restaurant manager user.

    A staff member with full management permissions.
    ManagerController - Class in Controllers
    Controller for the Manager UI.

    mapResultSetToReservation(ResultSet) - Method in class DAO.TableDAO
    Helper method to map a single row from a ResultSet into a Reservation object. * @param rs The ResultSet positioned at the desired row.
    mapToHalfHourSlot(LocalTime) - Method in class handlers.ReportHandler
    Maps a LocalTime to its corresponding half-hour slot string.
    MARK_NOTIFIED - Enum constant in enum class enums.ActionType
     
    markAsNotified(int) - Method in class DAO.ReservationDAO
    Updates the database to indicate that the customer has been notified about a change or cancellation.
    markAsNotified(int) - Method in class DAO.TableDAO
    Updates the reservation to mark that the user has seen the change notification. * @param resId The ID of the reservation
    markAsPaid() - Method in class Entities.Bill
    Marks the bill as paid.
    MarkNotifiedCommand - Class in commands
    Command implementation for updating the notification status of a reservation.

    MarkNotifiedHandler - Class in handlers
    Handles the server response for marking a reservation as notified.
    MarkNotifiedHandler() - Constructor for class handlers.MarkNotifiedHandler
     
    markReservationAsNotified(int) - Method in class handlers.ClientHandler
    Marks a reservation as notified
    markReservationAsNotified(int) - Method in class logicControllers.ReservationController
    Marks a reservation as 'notified' in the database, typically after a system-initiated cancellation. * @param reservationID The ID of the reservation to update.
    maxTables - Variable in class Entities.RestaurantSettings
    Maximum number of tables in the restaurant.
    membershipCode - Variable in class Controllers.LoginController
    Password field for the user to enter their membership code.
    membershipCode - Variable in class Controllers.RegisterationController
    Text fields for user input during registration: - userID: the ID of the user - name: full name - phone: phone number - email: email address - userName: username for login - membershipCode: optional membership code (for subscribers)
    membershipCode - Variable in class Entities.Manager
     
    membershipCode - Variable in class Entities.Subscriber
     
    membershipCode - Variable in class Entities.Supervisor
    Membership code assigned to the supervisor.
    membershipCode - Variable in class messages.LoginRequest
    The secret or unique membership code used to verify the user's authenticity.
    membershipCode - Variable in class messages.RegisterRequest
    The specific membership or subscription code.
    message - Variable in class common.ServerResponse
    A message describing the result of the operation.
    message - Variable in class src.ocsf.server.OriginatorMessage
    The message.
    message - Variable in class util.PaymentResult
    A descriptive message explaining the outcome of the payment attempt.
    Message - Class in common
    Represents a message sent between the client and server.

    Constructs a new Message with the specified action and data.
